question: How many times will this loop run? for i in range(3): print(i)
What will be output of: for i in range(2): for j in range(2): print(i,j)
Which keyword is used to skip current iteration?
What is output of: for i in range(5,1,-1): print(i)
Which statement exits a loop immediately?
How many times will this loop run? i=0; while i<3: print(i); i+=1
What is printed by: for i in range(0,6,2): print(i)
Which of the following is a nested loop?
options: for i in range(2): for j in range(2): print(i,j)
answer: for i in range(2): for j in range(2): print(i,j)
